description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a short-sleeved, button-up shirt with a relaxed fit, featuring a subtle palm tree pattern. He is wearing straight-cut jeans and casual sneakers, giving him a laid-back, everyday appearance suitable for urban environments. The figure's arms are extended horizontally, and his hands are relaxed at the ends of his outstretched arms. His facial features are defined, with short, neatly styled hair and a clean-shaven face. The clothing fits loosely, and the shoes appear to be comfortable for walking. The overall build is average, and the figure stands upright with a natural, confident posture.
description: A casually dressed adult male figure in a short-sleeved shirt, jeans, and sneakers, standing upright with arms extended. The figure has short hair and a relaxed, everyday urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open collar shirt, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the shirt's sleeve, and the side of the jeans and sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt with its pattern, the back of the jeans, and the figure's hair from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the shirt's sleeve, and the side of the jeans and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved button-up shirt and straight-cut jeans
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
